item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
or tendies perhaps
you go girls
stupid hornets
help em out, kyles of imgur
not really. but sorta
never really thought about this
i want that for some reason
mmm hmm
yeah the end of a jigsaw puzzle is tough
don't ask me
i can get onboard with this
it doesn't look promising
personal attack
hell yeah
don't we all
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Liz Lemon - Cosplay
item.description:
I didn’t share enough of these pics when I did this cosplay - Since I still get told I look like Tina Fey on here all the time when I go brunette (which, twist: per my last post you may notice is my real hair color :P) and I still just get a kick out of 30 Rock - here is me crushing it as Liz… Sabor De Soledad included :D
References I used :D

item.title: This dump is BANANAS! B-O-T-T-O-M shelf!
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
My Imgur sticker collection ❤️
My bananas are sponsored by Disney.
@igneus
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Taxi Bear tax.
Bonus Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Josephine Baker and the Banana Dance
item.description: It was the summer of 1926 at the Folies Bergère in Paris. Hordes of white Parisians flocked to the famed theater to see La Revue Nègre, a musical show that emerged from France due to the country’s fascination with jazz culture. And there, wearing little more than strings of pearls, wrist cuffs, and a skirt made of 16 rubber bananas, Josephine Baker descended from a palm tree onstage, and began to dance. This dance—the danse sauvage—is what established her as the biggest black female star in the world And for the Parisian fans who wanted to attempt to emulate her look, she sold Bakerskin, a skin-darkening lotion, and Bakerfix, a hair pomade. With the profits, Baker moved into the Château des Milandes, a 24-room mansion in southwestern France; adopted 12 children from around the world; and kept a menagerie of exotic companions such as a cheetah named Chiquita. During World War II, Baker aided the French Resistance by smuggling secret messages in invisible ink on her musical sheets. She hid Jewish refugees and weapons in her château that Bakerskin had helped pay for. In 1963, she was, notably, the only official female speaker to give an address at the March on Washington. She received the Croix de Guerre, the Médaille de la Résistance, and Légion d’Honneur. After she died on April 12, 1975, more than 20,000 people crowded the streets of Paris to watch the funeral procession on its way to L'Église de la Madeleine. https://www.vogue.com/article/josephine-baker-90th-anniversary-banana-skirt
item.dc:creator: azazyel

item.title: It is worth reading ConstanceBabbington Smith's book "Evidence in Camera" on the story of British photo reconnaissance. The RAF routinely photographed ALL of Germany. There were staff (usually women) who monitored each area.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: It was almost worth getting it stolen
item.description: I set my backpack down by my feet at a restaurant and by the time I paid the check, it was gone. Completely stolen. Never experienced anything like this before. I had to take the train to the U.S. embassy - who weren’t open at normal hours (?!) - and met the couple there. They were extremely eccentric. We bonded over this experience though. After we got our emergency passports, they took me out to breakfast and I was telling them about my hostel. They were utterly horrified at the idea of hostels being a thing and said they have good rapport with this ritzy hotel they’re staying at. They ended up getting me a room! Crazy how things work out.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Just two more days until the weekend, enjoy this wholesome dump : )
item.description:
1
2. In the end adults are just kids who pay bills....
3. When a college student cooks Beef Wellington
4. Buddies rolling around
5. Spikey splashy boy
6. How to deal with GF stealing your food (girfrilends hate this one simple trick)
7
8
9. The right way to start the morning
10. Guess who
11. That escalated quickly
12. When random cute animals start spawning in
13. Wholesome Simpsons
14. The tiniest doggo
15. Awww And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? UNTHINKABLE! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
